name: CORPSE CANDLE

abilities.name: Burning Brightly
abilities.text: After this model is summoned, draw a card.

abilities.name: Smoldering Heart
abilities.text: Before a friendly Revenant model within 1" of this model performs an opposed duel, it may kill this model to receive a (+).

abilities.name: Unliving Flame
abilities.text: When this model activates, it gains a Shielded token.

actions.name: A Lit Path
actions.effects: Make a Pyre marker within range. An enemy model within 3" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or move 3" toward the marker.

triggers.name: Spirit Guide
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with the made marker.

triggers.name: Flames of Protection
triggers.text: Allies within (aura)1" of the made marker gain a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Raging Flames
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)1" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Stunned token.

extraction_notes: Card shows both Minion and Totem as characteristics
